SEARCH

Package bupt.ta

package bupt.ta
BUPT International School teaching assistant recruitment system.

Servlet endpoints live in bupt.ta.servlet, business logic in bupt.ta.service, JSON persistence in bupt.ta.storage, and domain models in bupt.ta.model.
